2020-2024_ccd_enrollment.desc: Student enrollment demographic numbers matching the Common Core of Data (CCD) school directory.

columns.year: The school year that the data was collected.
columns.ncessch: The 12-digit unique National Center for Education Statistics school ID used to cross-reference school-level data.
columns.enrollment: The total integer count of students enrolled in that specific subcategory slice.
columns.leaid: The 7-digit unique Local Education Agency ID mapping the school directly to its school district.
columns.grade: The specific student grade level or instructional level category for the enrollment count.
columns.sex: The demographic student gender category used to filter the student counts.

2020-2024_ccd_directory.desc: Common Core of Data (CCD) public school directory tracking geographic locations and administrative IDs.

columns.year: The specific school year the directory information represents.
columns.school_name: The official text name of the public school.
columns.ncessch: The 12-digit unique National Center for Education Statistics school ID used to cross-reference school-level data.
columns.leaid: The 7-digit unique Local Education Agency ID mapping the school directly to its school district.
columns.lea_name: The official text name of the Local Education Agency (the school district).
columns.county_code: The unique Federal Information Processing Series (FIPS) county code where the school is located.
columns.city_location: The city or municipality name where the school is physically located.
columns.urban_centric_locale: Classifier for the school's location environment (e.g., City, Suburb, Town, Rural).
columns.longitude: The precise geographic longitude coordinate of the school for mapping and distance math.
columns.latitude: The precise geographic latitude coordinate of the school for mapping and distance math.
columns.school_level: The operational level of the school (e.g., Primary, Middle, High, Other).
columns.school_type: The classification type of the school (e.g., Regular public, Special education).
columns.charter: An indicator flag indicating whether the institution is a public charter school.
columns.magnet: An indicator flag indicating whether the institution offers a magnet program or is a magnet school.
columns.virtual: An indicator classifying the school's level of virtual/remote instruction.
columns.enrollment: The total student enrollment count reported for the school during this directory year.
columns.teachers_fte: The total Full-Time Equivalent (FTE) classroom teacher count employed at the school.
columns.free_or_reduced_lunch: The total number of students eligible to receive free or reduced-price lunch.
columns.direct_certification: The count of students directly certified for free meals through assistance programs like SNAP.

reportable_disease_surveillance_geograph.desc: Virginia Department of Health public use dataset containing annual case counts and incidence rates for reportable diseases.

columns.Year: The specific year the disease surveillance data was recorded.
columns.Condition: The name of the reportable disease.
columns.Geography Level: The scale of the geographic boundary used for reporting, typically classified as State, Health Planning Region, or Locality.
columns.Geography Value: The specific text name of the reporting area corresponding to the geography level (e.g., Virginia, Eastern Region, Fairfax County).
columns.FIPS: The standard Federal Information Processing Series numeric code uniquely identifying the specific Virginia county, independent city, or state boundary.
columns.Annual Case Count: The total integer count of confirmed or probable cases of the condition reported within that geography during the calendar year.
columns.Incidence Rate: The calculated rate of disease occurrence expressed as the number of reported cases per 100,000 population within the specified geography.

vgin_hospitals.desc: Virginia Geographic Information Network (VGIN) geospatial database tracking hospital locations, medical facilities, institutional names, and regional mapping coordinates across the Commonwealth of Virginia in 2025.

columns.OBJECTID: A unique internal tracking database serial number automatically assigned to each hospital feature record.
columns.VAPID: The Virginia Place Identifier; a unique state-level tracking alphanumeric code used to reference individual physical locations in VGIN databases.
columns.LandmkName: The official full text name of the landmark facility.
columns.Address: The physical street address of the hospital facility.
columns.City: The specific city or independent municipality name where the hospital is physically located.
columns.State: The two-letter postal code abbreviation for the state (e.g., VA).
columns.Zip: The standard 5-digit United States postal zip code for the facility location.
columns.X: The geographic longitude or easting spatial coordinate used for mapping and GIS visualization.
columns.Y: The geographic latitude or northing spatial coordinate used for mapping and GIS visualization.
columns.LOC: The localization status description or internal text flag signifying the precision level of the physical placement marker, where AP represents the highest precision.
columns.LastCheck: The timestamp or date tracking when the record's location data and details were last audited or updated by database administrators.
columns.PlaceType: The classificaiton of place the location is.
columns.SrcTyp: The service type classification indicating whether the facility profile tracks inpatient care, outpatient clinics, or specific clinical service delivery types.
columns.Src: The governing agency or health network system managing the facility data registry
columns.FIPScode: The standard numeric Federal Information Processing Series code identifying the specific local Virginia county or independent city boundary.
columns.FIPSname: The full text name of the local Virginia county or independent city corresponding to the numeric FIPScode (e.g., Montgomery County, Richmond City).

census_nass_crops.desc: United States Department of Agriculture (USDA) National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS) data tracking crops from 2022 census.

columns.source_desc: Source of data (CENSUS or SURVEY). Census program includes the Census of Ag as well as follow up projects. Survey program includes national, state, and county surveys.
columns.sector_desc: Five high level, broad categories useful to narrow down choices (Crops, Animals & Products, Economics, Demographics, and Environmental).
columns.group_desc: Subsets within sector (e.g., under sector = Crops, the groups are Field Crops, Fruit & Tree Nuts, Horticulture, and Vegetables).
columns.commodity_desc: The primary subject of interest (e.g., CORN, CATTLE, LABOR, TRACTORS, OPERATORS)
columns.class_desc: Generally a physical attribute (e.g., variety, size, color, gender) of the commodity.
columns.prodn_practice_desc: A method of production or action taken on the commodity (e.g., IRRIGATED, ORGANIC, ON FEED).
columns.util_practice_desc: Utilizations (e.g., GRAIN, FROZEN, SLAUGHTER) or marketing channels (e.g., FRESH MARKET, PROCESSING, RETAIL).
columns.statisticcat_desc: The aspect of a commodity being measured (e.g., AREA HARVESTED, PRICE RECEIVED, INVENTORY, SALES).
columns.unit_desc: The unit associated with the statistic category (e.g., ACRES, $ / LB, HEAD, $, OPERATIONS).
columns.short_desc: A concatenation of six columns: commodity_desc, class_desc, prodn_practice_desc, util_practice_desc, statisticcat_desc, and unit_desc.
columns.domain_desc: Generally another characteristic of operations that produce a particular commodity (e.g., ECONOMIC CLASS, AREA OPERATED, NAICS CLASSIFICATION, SALES). For chemical usage data, the domain describes the type of chemical applied to the commodity. The domain = TOTAL will have no further breakouts; i.e., the data value pertains completely to the short_desc.
columns.domaincat_desc: Categories or partitions within a domain (e.g., under domain = Sales, domain categories include $1,000 TO $9,999, $10,000 TO $19,999, etc).
columns.agg_level_desc: Aggregation level or geographic granularity of the data (e.g., State, Ag District, County, Region, Zip Code).
columns.state_ansi: American National Standards Institute (ANSI) standard 2-digit state codes.
columns.state_fips_code: NASS 2-digit state codes; include 99 and 98 for US TOTAL and OTHER STATES, respectively; otherwise match ANSI codes.
columns.asd_code: NASS defined county groups, unique within a state, 2-digit ag statistics district code.
columns.county_code: NASS 3-digit county codes; includes 998 for OTHER (COMBINED) COUNTIES and Alaska county codes; otherwise match ANSI codes.
columns.location_desc: Full description for the location dimension.
columns.year: The numeric year of the data.
columns.freq_desc: Length of time covered (Annual, Season, Monthly, Weekly, Point in Time). Monthly often covers more than one month. Point in Time is as of a particular day.
columns.Value: Published data value or suppression reason code.
columns.CV (%): Coefficient of variation. Available for the 2012 Census of Agriculture only. County-level CVs are generalized.

2020-2024_acs_master_county.desc: Data on disability, health insurance, education, and reciept of food stamps from ACS 5 year data.

columns.GEOID: Geographic identifier for tracking unique location
columns.NAME: Name of county.
columns.B06009: Place of Birth by Educational Attainment in the United States
columns.B15001: Sex by Age by Educational Attainment for the Population 18 Years and Over (ex. Female 18-24 years, has bachelors)
columns.B14005: Sex by School Enrollment by Educational Attainment by Employment Status for the Population 16 to 19 Year (ex. # females not enrolled in school, not high school graduate, not in labor force)
columns.B27019: Health Insurance Coverage Status and Type by Age by Educational Attainment (ex. 26-64 years, has bachelors degree, no health insurance)
columns.B27022: Health Insurance Coverage Status by Sex by Enrollment Status for Young Adults Aged 19 to 25 (ex. Male, enrolled in school, no health insurance)
columns.B14003: Sex by School Enrollment by Type of School by Age for the Population 3 Years and Over (for ex. Male enrolled in public school age 15-17 years)
columns.B14007: School Enrollment by Detailed Level of School for the Population 3 Years and Over (for example, B14007B gets total enrolled in type of school for African American)
columns.B17003: Poverty Status in the Past 12 Months of Individuals by Sex by Educational Attainment (for example, male, bachelors degree, in last 12 months has been in poverty)
columns.B27001: Health Insurance covered by Sex by Age (ex. total 6-18 year old males with health insurance)
columns.B27010: Types of Health Insurance covered by Age (ex. Total under 19 year old males with Tricare military health coverage only)
columns.B27020: Health Insurance coverage Status and Type by Citizenship (ex. Foreign-born noncitizen with private health insurance)
columns.B27002: Private Health Insurance Status by Sex by Age (ex. Total 6-18 year old males with private health insurance)
columns.B27003: Public Health Insurance Status by Sex by Age (ex. Total 6-18 year old males with public health insurance)
columns.B27011: Health Insurance Coverage Status and Type by Employment Status (ex. Total employed with private health insurance)
columns.B27015: Health Insurance Coverage Status and Type by Household Income in the Past 12 Months (in 2024 Inflation-Adjusted Dollars) (ex. Total population under $25,000 with private health insurance)
columns.B18101: Age by Disability Status (also filters by race) (ex. Total White under 18 years with disability)
columns.B18102: Sex by Age by Hearing Difficulty (ex. Total male 5 to 17 years with hearing difficulty)
columns.B18103: Sex by Age by Vision Difficulty (ex. Total male from 5 to 17 years with vision difficulty)
columns.B18104: Sex by Age by Cognitive Difficulty (ex. Total male from 5 to 17 years with cognitive difficulty)
columns.B18105: Sex by Age by Ambulatory Difficulty (ex. Total male from 5 to 17 years with ambulatory difficulty)
columns.B18106: Sex by Age by Self-Care Difficulty (ex. Total males from 5 to 17 years with self-care difficulty)
columns.B18107: Sex by Age by Independent Living Difficulty (ex. Total number of males from 18 to 34 years with independent living difficulty)
columns.C27001: Health Insurance Coverage Status by Age (also filters by race) (ex. Total American Indian and Alaska Native under 19 years with health insurance)
columns.C27004: Employer-Based Health Insurance by Sex by Age ( ex. Total males under 19 years with employer-based health insurance)
columns.C27005: Direct-Purchase Health Insurance by Sex by Age (ex. Total males under 19 years with direct-purchase health insurance)
columns.C27007: Medicaid covered by Sex by Age (ex. Total under 19 years old males with Medicaid)
columns.C27006: Medicare covered by Sex by Age (ex. Total under 19 years old males with Medicare)
columns.C27008: TRICARE/Military Health Coverage by Sex by Age (ex. Total males under 19 years with TRICARE/Military Health Coverage)
columns.C27009: VA Health Care by Sex by Age (ex. Total under 19 years old males with VA Health Care)
columns.C27012: Health Insurance Coverage Status and Type by Work Experience (ex. Total worked full-time year-round with health insurance with Medicaid)
columns.C27013: Private Health Insurance by Work Experience (ex. Total worked full-time year-round with private health insurance)
columns.C27014: Public Health Insurance by Work Experience (ex. Total worked full-time year-round with public coverage)
columns.C27016: Health Insurance Coverage Status by Ratio of Income to Poverty Level in the Past 12 Months by Age (ex. Total under 1.00 poverty threshold under 19 years with health insurance coverage)
columns.C27017: Private Health Insurance by Ratio of Income to Poverty Level in the Past 12 Months by Age (ex. Total under 1.00 poverty threshold under 19 years with private health insurance coverage)
columns.C27018: Public Health Insurance by Ratio of Income to Poverty Level in the Past 12 Months by Age (ex. Total under 1.00 poverty threshold under 19 years with public coverage)
columns.C27021: Health Insurance Coverage Status by Living Arrangement (ex. Total married couple families with health insurance)
columns.B22001: Receipt of Food Stamps/SNAP in the Past 12 Months by Presence of People 60 Years and Over for Households (ex. At least one person in household 60 years or over)
columns.B22002: Receipt of Food Stamps/SNAP in the Past 12 Months by Presence of Children Under 18 Years by Household Type for Households (ex. With children under 18 years old in married-couple family)
columns.B22003: Receipt of Food Stamps/SNAP in the Past 12 Months by Poverty Status in the Past 12 Months for Households (ex. Income in the past 12 months below poverty level)
columns.B22005: Receipt of Food Stamps/SNAP in the Past 12 Months by Race of Householder (ex. American Indian and Alaska Native Alone)
columns.B22007: Receipt of Food Stamps/SNAP in the Past 12 Months by Family Type by Number of Workers in Family in the Past 12 Months (ex. 2 workers with both spouses working)
columns.B22010: Receipt of Food Stamps/SNAP in the Past 12 Months by Disability Status for Households (ex. Households with 1 or more persons with a disability)
